title: Amira Feels the Wind
synopsis: Baby Amira explores different feelings as she experiences the gentle wind in nature, from calm breezes to playful gusts, learning that all feelings are natural and wonderful.

pages.text: Amira feels the soft wind. Whoosh!

illustration.description: A smiling baby girl with dark curly hair and warm brown skin sits in green grass. Her light yellow dress flutters gently in a soft breeze. Pink cherry blossoms drift around her. The background shows rolling hills in soft pastels.
illustration.alt: Baby Amira sitting peacefully in a meadow with wind blowing gently

pages.text: The wind makes her happy. Giggle, giggle!

illustration.description: Amira claps her small hands with pure joy, her eyes sparkling. Gentle wind moves her curls and dress. A diverse family picnics nearby - an Asian mother, Black father, and mixed-race toddler. Warm golden light filters through trees.
illustration.alt: Happy Amira giggling as wind plays around her with family in background

illustration.description: The wind blows stronger now, moving leaves and grass around Amira. Her expression shows surprise with wide eyes and open mouth. Her dress and hair blow dramatically. The colors are slightly cooler blues and greens.

Amira's eyebrows are raised high with wonder as colorful autumn leaves swirl around her. A Hispanic grandmother nearby reaches out protectively. The scene uses warm oranges and reds with high contrast.
illustration.alt: Amira looking surprised as leaves swirl in the wind

illustration.description: Very strong wind bends the trees and grass. Amira's hair streams behind her and her yellow dress billows. Her expression shows concern with slightly furrowed brows. Dark storm clouds gather in soft grays.
illustration.alt: Amira in very strong wind with storm clouds

illustration.description: Amira reaches her arms up toward a kind-faced woman with a hijab and olive skin - her mama. The woman bends down with loving arms open. Soft purple and blue tones create a protective, comforting mood.
illustration.alt: Worried Amira reaching for her mama's comforting embrace

pages.text: Mama holds Amira close. Safe and warm.

illustration.description: Mama wraps Amira in a gentle hug as they sit together. Both have peaceful, content expressions. The wind still blows but feels less scary now. Soft pink and cream colors create warmth and security.
illustration.alt: Mama holding Amira safely in her arms

pages.text: Wind becomes gentle again. Whoosh, whoosh.

illustration.description: The wind is soft and calm once more. Amira and her mama sit together smiling as gentle breezes move through their hair. Sunlight breaks through clouds in golden rays. A diverse group of children play peacefully nearby.
illustration.alt: Amira and mama enjoying gentle wind together

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Amira smiles.

illustration.description: Happy Amira waves goodbye to the reader with a bright smile. Her mama stands behind her with loving hands on her shoulders. The scene shows a beautiful sunset with warm oranges and pinks. Birds fly peacefully overhead.
illustration.alt: Smiling Amira waving with her mama in a peaceful sunset scene

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the wind make?
questions.explanation: The wind goes 'Whoosh!' throughout the story.

questions.question: Who helps Amira when she feels worried?
questions.explanation: Mama holds Amira close when she feels worried about the strong wind.

questions.question: How does Amira feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Amira smiles at the end because all feelings are okay.

pages.text: The wind makes her ___. Giggle, giggle!
